entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0117.10093] In the statement 9952153 - Statement - Condensed Consolidated Statements of Operations (Loss) (Unaudited) the concept us-gaap:Revenues with a value of -5,997,000 and dimension of srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and member of rily:FairValueAdjustmentOnLoansMember is not equal to the dimensional breakdown of -3,185,000 using the dimension srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and the second dimension us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis: FairValueAdjustmentOnLoansMember --> -3,185,000 --> us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis=us-gaap:RelatedPartyMember, srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:FairValueAdjustmentOnLoansMember
On the face financial statements it is expected that values reported are dimensionally complete for a given line item. If you added up the values of the dimensions the resulting sum should represent the actual aggregate value. This rule takes the dimensional values of an axis reported on the face financial statements and adds them up and compares them to the actual aggregate value reported anywhere in the filing. If they are different the rule reports an error.
The properties of this us-gaap:Revenues fact are: Period :2025-01-01 to 2025-09-30 Unit : USD Dimensions : srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:FairValueAdjustmentOnLoansMember Rule Element Id:10093 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - rily-20250930.htm 8

[DQC.US.0117.10093] In the statement 9952153 - Statement - Condensed Consolidated Statements of Operations (Loss) (Unaudited) the concept us-gaap:Revenues with a value of 9,143,000 and dimension of srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and member of rily:InterestIncomeLoansMember is not equal to the dimensional breakdown of 1,818,000 using the dimension srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and the second dimension us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis: InterestIncomeLoansMember --> 1,818,000 --> us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis=us-gaap:RelatedPartyMember, srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:InterestIncomeLoansMember
On the face financial statements it is expected that values reported are dimensionally complete for a given line item. If you added up the values of the dimensions the resulting sum should represent the actual aggregate value. This rule takes the dimensional values of an axis reported on the face financial statements and adds them up and compares them to the actual aggregate value reported anywhere in the filing. If they are different the rule reports an error.
The properties of this us-gaap:Revenues fact are: Period :2025-01-01 to 2025-09-30 Unit : USD Dimensions : srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:InterestIncomeLoansMember Rule Element Id:10093 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - rily-20250930.htm 8

[DQC.US.0117.10093] In the statement 9952153 - Statement - Condensed Consolidated Statements of Operations (Loss) (Unaudited) the concept us-gaap:Revenues with a value of 475,279,000 and dimension of srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and member of rily:ServiceAndFeeRevenuesMember is not equal to the dimensional breakdown of 9,168,000 using the dimension srt:ProductOrServiceAxis and the second dimension us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis: ServiceAndFeeRevenuesMember --> 9,168,000 --> srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:ServiceAndFeeRevenuesMember, us-gaap:RelatedPartyTransactionsByRelatedPartyAxis=us-gaap:RelatedPartyMember
On the face financial statements it is expected that values reported are dimensionally complete for a given line item. If you added up the values of the dimensions the resulting sum should represent the actual aggregate value. This rule takes the dimensional values of an axis reported on the face financial statements and adds them up and compares them to the actual aggregate value reported anywhere in the filing. If they are different the rule reports an error.
The properties of this us-gaap:Revenues fact are: Period :2025-01-01 to 2025-09-30 Unit : USD Dimensions : srt:ProductOrServiceAxis=rily:ServiceAndFeeRevenuesMember Rule Element Id:10093 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - rily-20250930.htm 8
